title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Brookfield India REIT

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Brookfield India REIT
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Brookfield India REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Brookfield India REIT:
Brookfield India REIT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brookfield India REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
